intended_rule: Remove UGL leveraged gold downside exposure as the cleanup risk valve; do not re-add.
actual_execution: Confirmed market sell of all 10 UGL shares at 52.385 USD for 523.85 USD. Position transitioned from 10 shares to 0 shares.
account_risk_improvement: Removed the remaining leveraged gold ETF exposure before subsequent UGL weakness.
short_term_price_outcome: UGL later traded around 51.18-51.38. This supports effectiveness but is not the primary correctness criterion.
review_conclusion: UGL cleanup completed and the GLD-405 forced UGL cleanup rule is retired because UGL is closed.
lessons_learned: Leveraged exposure cleanup should record position-before, position-after, fill amount, and rule retirement.
Execution correctness is based on risk removal rather than best-price hindsight.
next_rule_update: Set UGL position to 0 shares, state to closed_position, and remove UGL from active risk valves.
